title: Finding affordable copy of EoE
wikitext:
[]: Finding affordable copy of EoE             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Wed Jul 20, 2011 10:11 am Can anyone tell me where in gods green earth can I find a DVD copy of End of Eva that DOESN'T cost 100 bucks? Seriously, it's just the DVD and case I want, why is it so hard to find?!

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Wed Jul 20, 2011 10:15 am Cause out of print and licensing issues.

[]:             Quote Post by Yue » Wed Jul 20, 2011 10:16 am I would wholeheartedly NOT suggest IMing me for a lead on a legitimate way to watch it without spending that much money. That would be silly.

[]:             Quote Post by Sarge133 » Wed Jul 20, 2011 10:18 am http://www.amazon.com/gp/offer-listing/B000068OJ1/ref=wl_it_of_o?ie=UTF8&coliid=I2QA1MU7FO2G9Q&colid=2OJJIYLRJQF7C&condition=all

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Wed Jul 20, 2011 10:20 am Sarge133 wrote: http://www.amazon.com/gp/offer-listing/B000068OJ1/ref=wl_it_of_o?ie=UTF8&coliid=I2QA1MU7FO2G9Q&colid=2OJJIYLRJQF7C&condition=all

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Wed Jul 20, 2011 10:24 am TheFriskyIan wrote: I'm not a big fan of the used section, but I guess I'm in no position to be picky.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jul 20, 2011 11:20 am TheFriskyIan wrote: I'm not a big fan of the used section, but I guess I'm in no position to be picky.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Jul 20, 2011 11:21 am Maybe you could get the UK release, but it's kinda expensive on Amazon.co.uk (39.95£) and it's also Region 2 and PAL, you should check if your player is compatible. Also both US and UK editions suck a lot, the Italian one uses the Renewal masters but no English subs, so I doubt that you could be interested (and it's also R2/PAL).

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jul 20, 2011 11:25 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: Maybe you could get the UK release, but it's kinda expensive on Amazon.co.uk (39.95£) and it's also Region 2 and PAL, you should check if your player is compatible.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Jul 20, 2011 11:29 am ^it was just a suggestion, unfortunately the Eva releases (manga, series and movies) are a complete mess in the US.

[]:             Quote Post by Tarnsman » Wed Jul 20, 2011 11:43 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: ^it was just a suggestion, unfortunately the Eva releases (manga, series and movies) are a complete mess in the US.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Jul 20, 2011 11:54 am Tarnsman wrote: The series release in the US is pretty good, a little bloated, but still decent and reasonably priced.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jul 20, 2011 12:24 pm I think it's time I auction off my extra D&R and EoE set for RIDICULOUS PROFIT.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Wed Jul 20, 2011 3:38 pm Normally I don't advocate things like this, but just pirate it. Unless you know Japanese, you won't be able to find a decent release.

[]:             Quote Post by BiQ » Wed Jul 20, 2011 4:34 pm If you wanna feel better about pirating it, you can buy the Japanese Renewal release AND then just get the zx fansub that's based on the same high-quality video. Or if you wanna feel really A-Ok with it, you can rip the Japanese dvd by yourself, mux some subtitles off from interwebz onto the video and master it back onto DVD-R by yourself. No, I don't know if that's really legal either, but I do know I have hard time seeing it unethical. Personally, I'm just happy I was around to get both D&R and EoE (and Perfect Collection nge box) when they were released. This January I finally got off my stingy arse and bought the platinum collection, too. But when I actually watch Evangelion, I just fire up the zx fansub sitting on my HD (also useful for looking up things relatively quickly in the middle of arguments) and don't even feel the slightest bit bad about it. ...actually, now that we are on the case, I have been thinking about getting the Japanese renewal release (of EoE only, D&R is quite useless for me honestly). [s]Any suggestions how to go about that?[/s] Edit: nevermind, found that info already.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jul 20, 2011 5:05 pm The Renewal Feature Films include Death and EoE, no Rebirth. Info here (so happy this site's up!): http://svenge.pcriot.com/evasite/jprenew/KIBA1009.htm & http://svenge.pcriot.com/evasite/jprenew/KIBA1209.htm Main site: http://svenge.pcriot.com/index.htm CDJapan's probably one of the best sites to buy it from: http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Wed Jul 20, 2011 8:45 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: The Renewal Feature Films include Death and EoE, no Rebirth. Info here (so happy this site's up!): http://svenge.pcriot.com/evasite/jprenew/KIBA1009.htm & http://svenge.pcriot.com/evasite/jprenew/KIBA1209.htm Main site: http://svenge.pcriot.com/index.htm CDJapan's probably one of the best sites to buy it from: http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/

[]:             Quote Post by BiQ » Thu Jul 21, 2011 5:44 am Well yeah. KIBA-1209 orderd from yesasia.com thanks to their free shipping. Now to hope that Euro does not plunge down against USD before they ship and bill that order... :P ($94.24 is something like € 67 right now.) Thankyouverymuch, Greece and european finance sector (*grumble grumble*)... okay, I guess *our* buttheadedness isn't helping any right now.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jul 21, 2011 5:51 am BiQ wrote: Well yeah. KIBA-1209 orderd from yesasia.com thanks to their free shipping. Now to hope that Euro does not plunge down against USD before they ship and bill that order... :P ($94.24 is something like € 67 right now.)

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Thu Jul 21, 2011 5:58 am BiQ wrote: Well yeah. KIBA-1209 orderd from yesasia.com thanks to their free shipping. Now to hope that Euro does not plunge down against USD before they ship and bill that order... :P ($94.24 is something like € 67 right now.) Thankyouverymuch, Greece and european finance sector (*grumble grumble*)... okay, I guess *our* buttheadedness isn't helping any right now.
